deep_dive.executive_summary: At $131.70 (Yahoo close 2026-07-20), our base case annual return is -3.78% per year over seven years on mid-cycle normalized owner cash $3.81 per share. Axcelis is a cyclical ion implant equipment supplier with a focused Purion franchise and high-margin services mix. FY2025 marked a wafer-fabrication equipment downcycle trough: revenue $839 million, gross profit margin near 45%, operating income $119 million, and free cash flow $107 million ($3.38 per share). The balance sheet is debt-free with $146 million cash and $457 million systems backlog. The proof-first component schedule sums to $6...

pricing_analysis.conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (Capital cycle and normalized industry economics). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.
pricing_analysis.economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of Axcelis Technologies, including mid-cycle ion implant operations, systems backlog conversion option, net cash claims, and cycle reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Debt-free balance sheet; operating value and backlog option are additive; cycle reserve is a liability component; services cash flow embedded in core engine.

economic_value_bridge.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q; mid-cycle owner cash normalized across FY2023-FY2025.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of Axcelis Technologies, including mid-cycle ion implant operations, systems backlog conversion option, net cash claims, and cycle reserve.

valuation_proof.adjustment: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or cycle path is materially worse than low case.

timeline.label: Q1 2026 revenue $199M; operating income $8.0M; cash $151M; backlog remains under prior-year levels
FY2025 revenue trough $839M (systems $571M); net income $120M; systems backlog $457M down from $646M
FY2024 revenue $1,018M; net income $201M; systems backlog $646M near cycle peak
Cycle revenue peak $1,131M consolidated; net income $246M; Purion mix expansion
Purion platform drove share gains in power device and mature-node implant markets during prior upcycle
Upcycle capital returns: active share repurchases while WFE demand accelerated
Prior downcycle base: revenue $477M before 2021–2023 WFE expansion

industry.structure: Ion implant is a concentrated niche within wafer-fabrication equipment; Axcelis competes with Applied Materials and Sumitomo Heavy Industries. Purion product focus and services attach rate support mid-cycle margins near 45% gross profit.
industry.share_shift: Axcelis gained share during the 2021–2023 WFE upcycle on Purion H and SiC-capable tools, but FY2025 systems revenue fell 27% as customers delayed capacity adds.
industry.trend: Power devices (SiC, IGBT) and mature-node implants remain structural growth drivers, while memory and leading-edge spending cycles drive order volatility. Backlog conversion and China export dynamics are the near-term swing factors.

valuation_route.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
